## Main Conference (1)

### [Approximate Equivariance in Reinforcement Learning](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=SOrZWcuz3j>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-aistats-park-approximate-equivariance

**Authors:** Jung Yeon Park, Sujay Bhatt, Sihan Zeng, Lawson L.S. Wong, Alec Koppel, Sumitra Ganesh, Robin Walters

**Venue / year:** AISTATS · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-12

**Topics:** Alpha Modeling · Financial Agents · Evaluation

**Assets / frequency:** Equities

**Identifiers:** OpenReview SOrZWcuz3j

**Focus:** Relaxes exact symmetry in reinforcement-learning policies and evaluates the resulting architecture on stock trading with real financial data.

**Why it matters:** Tests whether approximate market symmetries improve trading-policy performance and noise robustness without imposing unrealistic invariances.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.mlr.press/v258/park25d.html>) · [Paper](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=SOrZWcuz3j>)
